decision.read: Manual TGMM helper VJP is correct enough to finish the 8x run but loses throughput. It reduces the autograd helper boundary only partially and adds explicit TGMM/wgrad overhead; the retained standard-EP top-8 AdamW baseline remains better.
decision.next_action: Do not tune manual_tgmm further. Continue toward first-class compact-row helper/VJP layout or sparse MLA backward work.
